original_prompt: Implement vacation capabilities: update schema with vacation metadata, add vacation manager to users view, implement isUserOnVacation helper, and update appointments grid to block vacation dates.
rephrased_goal: Integrate technician vacation tracking into the system by updating the User schema, adding a range-picker UI to user management, and hardening the scheduling engine to prevent booking on vacation days.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Update travel-logic.js with vacation check
tasks.analogy_reference: adding 'not home' rule to tribe logic
tasks.testing_criteria: Exported function correctly identifies overlapping date ranges.

subtasks_required: 2.1 Verify isUserOnVacation handles missing metadata or invalid dates

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Update view.users.js with Vacation Manager
subtasks_required: 3.3 Update edit modal HTML to include vacation section
3.4 Update save logic to capture vacation array
tasks.analogy_reference: painting 'out of cave' dates on tribe wall
tasks.testing_criteria: User edit modal shows vacation rows and saves to Firestore.
UI compiles and no syntax errors.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Update view.appointments.js to respect vacations
subtasks_required: 5.3 Update updateDailyGrid to check vacation status
tasks.analogy_reference: telling hunter not to call sleeping tribe member
tasks.testing_criteria: Daily grid slots correctly block vacationing technicians.
System is syntactically sound and respects new constraints.

subtasks_required: Update firebase-blueprint.json with User metadata.vacation field
tasks.testing_criteria: App runs, schema is updated, wiki reflects vacation features.
